subcodes.first_line: O friend! The Friend hath borne witness to thy friendship, and this sufficeth thee, by the Lord of all worlds. This word is sweet on the tongue of them that love [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دوست دوست بدوستیت شهادت داده هذا یکفیک ورب العالمین این کلمه در کام عشاق
subcodes.subjects: @work as worship, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @excellence; distinction, @praise and encouragement, @love of God
